description:
Rewrite python.<name> → turnkey.<name>:

- src/python/**/*.py (all cross-member imports, including __init__.py re-exports)
- src/cmd/compute-unified-features/__main__.py
- src/python/*/rules.star: base_module = 'python.<name>' → 'turnkey.<name>'
- Delete src/python/__init__.py (artifact that made python.cargo importable via pythonpath=['src']).
- Remove pythonpath = ['src'] from root pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] — uv sync installs members editable, so pytest finds them via the venv.

Requires children 1 and 3 to have landed (members must be installable and uv.lock must exist) for the renamed imports to actually resolve.

Verify: 'uv run pytest' and 'tk build //src/python/...'. After this, 'grep -rn "from python\.\|import python\." src/' should return nothing.
title: Rename python.* imports to turnkey.* across tree
